title: Access Pulse Values From Zapier Webhook
excerpt:

posts.author: WairaMAngle (Waira Mendoza Angle)
posts.cookedHtml:
At this time there is no way to easily pull data from Monday.com fields for use in other platforms such as Asana, Zapier, etc.

The Zapier webhook feature currently does not contain the pulse values so we have to automate an email notification and pull those fields using a Zapier email parser which makes setting up complex automations through Zapier very difficult.

Please allow us to utilize the column data in the Zapier webhook automation.

posts.author: Simonga25 (George Simon)
posts.cookedHtml: This totally needs more upvotes. This is the number one problem with Monday: users can’t easily access column data in Zapier.
